strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Direct AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-era tooling, workshops)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the resume
Kotlin not mentioned; Java exposure is older and limited
response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned fullstack engineer whose core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker) and recent AI-agent/MCP work align closely with the role's primary responsibilities and emerging AI requirements. Gaps around Nest.js and Kotlin, plus a current career gap, are notable but offset by deep architecture, testing discipline, and a long track record of delivering end-to-end features.
